channel.title: Microsoft Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Microsoft Corporation (microsoft).

item.title: CVE-2026-58523 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Microsoft Edge for Android Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Improper access control in Microsoft Edge for Android allows an unauthorized attacker to bypass a security feature over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58291 · 6.1 MEDIUM — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Operation on a resource after expiration or release in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-45489 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Spoofing Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2026-58597 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Insufficient ui warning of dangerous operations in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58524 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58300 · 6.2 MEDIUM — Microsoft Edge for Android Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Absolute path traversal in Microsoft Edge for Android allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58298 · 7.2 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58297 · 7.1 HIGH — Microsoft Edge for Android Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Exposure of private personal information to an unauthorized actor in Microsoft Edge for Android allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58296 · 7.1 HIGH — Microsoft Edge for Android Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Exposure of private personal information to an unauthorized actor in Microsoft Edge for Android allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58295 · 8.3 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Access of resource using incompatible type ('type confusion') in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to bypass a security feature over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58294 · 7.5 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58293 · 8.1 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: External control of file name or path in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58292 · 7.5 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Improper input validation in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58290 · 7.5 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Access of resource using incompatible type ('type confusion') in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58289 · 9 CRITICAL — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Access of resource using incompatible type ('type confusion') in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58288 · 8.3 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58286 · 8.1 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Improper access control in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58285 · 8.3 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Access of resource using incompatible type ('type confusion') in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58284 · 8.3 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Improper authorization in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58278 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Server-side request forgery (ssrf) in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58276 · 7.5 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-57991 · 7.4 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Improper link resolution before file access ('link following') in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-57986 · 7.5 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-57981 · 8.8 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-57977 · 7.1 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-57974 · 8.8 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Integer overflow or wraparound in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-45488 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: User interface (ui) misrepresentation of critical information in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58522 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Microsoft Edge for Android Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Relative path traversal in Microsoft Edge for Android allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58299 · 7.5 HIGH — Microsoft Edge for Android Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Time-of-check time-of-use (toctou) race condition in Microsoft Edge for Android allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58287 · 8.3 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58283 · 8.1 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Access of resource using incompatible type ('type confusion') in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58282 · 8.1 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Improper access control in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-56646 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Exposure of sensitive information to an unauthorized actor in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-57993 · 7.4 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Server-side request forgery (ssrf) in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-57992 · 7.5 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-57988 · 7.1 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Relative path traversal in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-57987 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Server-side request forgery (ssrf) in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-57985 · 7.6 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Improper input validation in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-57984 · 7.5 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-57983 · 8.7 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Improper authorization in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to bypass a security feature over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-57975 · 7.5 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Access of resource using incompatible type ('type confusion') in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-56645 · 8.8 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-55945 · 4.2 MEDIUM — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Concurrent execution using shared resource with improper synchronization ('race condition') in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an authorized attacker to disclose information locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-54998 · 8.8 HIGH ☁️ — Microsoft Exchange Online Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Incorrect authorization in Microsoft Exchange Online allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-41106 · 9.3 CRITICAL ☁️ — Microsoft 365 Copilot Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Url redirection to untrusted site ('open redirect') in M365 Copilot allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-26145 · 4.8 MEDIUM ☁️ — Microsoft Azure Synapse Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper access control in Azure Synapse allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-45499 · 9.9 CRITICAL ☁️ — Azure OpenAI Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Server-side request forgery (ssrf) in Azure OpenAI allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-57100 · 9.9 CRITICAL ☁️ — Microsoft Entra Provisioning Service Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Server-side request forgery (ssrf) in Microsoft Entra Provisioning Service (SyncFabric) allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-50521 · 8.3 HIGH — Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an authorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-47645 · 8.8 HIGH ☁️ — Microsoft 365 Copilot's Business Chat Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Url redirection to untrusted site ('open redirect') in Microsoft 365 Copilot's Business Chat allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.
